components.label: Total Provisioned thorughput cost for Titan Image Generator

helpText.aws: With Amazon Bedrock, you will be charged for model inference and customization. You have a choice of two consumption plans for inference: 1/ On Demand: This mode allows you to use FMs on a pay-as-you-go basis without having to make any time-based term commitments. 2/ Provisioned Throughput: This mode allows you to provision sufficient throughput to meet your application's performance requirements in exchange for a time-based term commitment.
